content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月22日 周五
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [Doorman11991/smallcode](https://github.com/Doorman11991/smallcode)
   AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model. | ⭐1069
2. [AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App](https://github.com/AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App)
   Claude pro free Mythos design Opus Cowork  Sonnet AI Anthropic App: download fre | ⭐581
3. [SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser](https://github.com/SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser)
   CloakBrowser Github: anti-detect browser download, source-level chromium patches | ⭐492
4. [evilsocket/audit](https://github.com/evilsocket/audit)
   An 8-stage vulnerability-discovery agent. | ⭐400
5. [CylinderChairman/aida64](https://github.com/CylinderChairman/aida64)
   aida64 unlocker extreme edition | ⭐396
6. [basketikun/infinite-canvas](https://github.com/basketikun/infinite-canvas)
   面向AI创作的开源无限画布工作台，集成 AI 生图、参考图编辑、画布编排、对话助手、提示词库和素材管理等功能。 | ⭐333
7. [lynote-ai/humanize-text](https://github.com/lynote-ai/humanize-text)
   Free open-source AI text humanizer to convert AI-generated content into undetect | ⭐283
8. [paradigmxyz/centaur](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/centaur)
   Multiplayer, self-hosted, secure agents. | ⭐177

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
